topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Media Commentary

topics.title: Radio Show Wrap-up and Music Preview
topics.summary: The studio discusses various segments including personal anecdotes about discarded food, upcoming show highlights involving physical comedy, listener messages regarding phone numbers, and previews of new music from artists like Prince and Leslie West.

topics.title: Lindsay Lohan Legal Issues and Sexual Health News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a new sex lubricant that may block HIV and genital herpes while also covering Lindsay Lohan's legal troubles and various personal anecdotes from the hosts.

topics.summary: The studio explores a list of high-earning television personalities while navigating personal anecdotes regarding gift exchanges, weight concerns, and a heated exchange between callers.

topics.title: Sports Scandals and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including allegations of performance-enhancing drugs in baseball, the upcoming trial of R. Kelly, reports on a cat that senses death, TSA security alerts regarding suspicious packaging, and updates on various comedy tours.
